programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López alquila una plaza de parking. Él no tiene ni coche ni carnet de conducir pero ese parece un buen sistema para planteárselo en serio e intentar sacárselo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López se han enamorado de Emma. Ninguno dejará que el otro la vea a solas y saque ventaja. Carbonell intenta vender a todo el mundo un viaje organizado por ella.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Carbonell, Ramón, Pol y Mercedes regresan del viaje. Ramón no para de contar que Pol le salvó la vida y que siempre estará en deuda con él.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma se ha ido. López y David están hechos polvo tras su marcha. Al enterarse de que el administrador del bloque busca un nuevo inquilino para la casita de madera, David y López salen desesperadamente en busca de Emma.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López no saben qué hacer con un paquete de droga que les ha llegado por error. Si lo venden, pueden sacar mucho dinero pero si les pillan... aunque quizás deberían preocuparse por si su dueño lo reclama.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma quiere pedir el paro pero allí la convocan a un cursillo y debe pasar un examen. Carbonell y Mercedes le echarán una mano para que apruebe.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Mercedes intenta hablar de un tema importante con López, que la esquiva constantemente por miedo a que le eche una bronca.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Mercedes decide darse un tiempo de reflexión y descanso después de su ruptura sentimental. Se va de la radio y nombra a López nuevo director.

programme.desc: Pol descubre que Emma está enamorada de López y les prepara una cita a través de un anónimo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David descubre que su madre tiene un amante y decide contárselo a su padre pero no sabe por donde empezar.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Pol decide sacar más partido del bar Mauricio y prepara varias actuaciones que sirvan de reclamo para ganar clientes. David prepara una actuación que muestre sus grandes dotes interpretativas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David decide montar una fiesta para celebrar la noche de Halloween. López, mucho más tradicional, prefiere celebrar la castañada.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: La exnovia de López regresa a Barcelona para verle y para proponerle que engendre a su hijo ya que quiere ser madre soltera.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Carbonell lleva a casa un gato que pertenece a un "capo" mafioso, al que le debe un favor. Deberá cuidarlo durante el fin de semana.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David está resfriado y decide llamar al médico de la Seguridad Social.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Pol, López y David leen en el periódico que un asesino anda suelto por su barrio.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Carbonell conoce a un hombre en una discoteca y empiezan a bailar muy compenetrados.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: El reencuentro entre Oriol y Carbonell desencadena la prisa de López y David por llevar a la pareja hasta el altar, no sin antes celebrar las respectivas despedidas de soltero.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: ¡Qué bonita es la Navidad! El pesebre, el árbol, los regalos, los villancicos, la familia... y las peleas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: En este capítulo se descubre quienes son "realmente" los actores que dan vida a los personajes de la serie. Asistimos a la representación de lo que es una grabación en plató de uno de los capítulos y podemos ver a David haciendo de Joel Joan, a López haciendo de Jordi Sánchez, etc.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Desde que Carbonell se casó y se fue a vivir a Porrera con Oriol, David no da una. Acostumbrado a que se lo hicieran todo, ahora tiene que espabilarse solo y no se le da muy bien.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López es un desastre como asistenta así que David decide organizar un "casting" para encontrar a alguien que sea competente.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Carbonell se separa de Oriol y regresa al piso de López y David. Éstos descubren casualmente que Oriol es propietario de muchas tierras y fuerzan el divorcio de Carbonell y Oriol a fin de sacar tajada de la ruptura.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David recibe la llamada de un productor convocándole a un casting en Madrid. Él sabe que es una gran oportunidad para su carrera de actor.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma presenta una amiga suya, Lola, a David y éste se queda embobado. Con la ayuda de Carbonell monta una fiesta en el piso para poder invitarla. Por otro lado, a López le cae un "encargo" de sus jefes de la radio: hacer de canguro de su hijo. La fiesta será el punto de encuentro para sorpresa de uno y enfado del otro.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David sale con Lola pero, en realidad, está enamorado de Marina, la amiga de Lola. Por eso, prepara una cena y le pide a López que se líe con Lola, pero éste es un despistado y se pasa toda la noche confundiéndolas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y Marina ya salen juntos y están muy enamorados. Los amigos de David no entienden esta relación (Marina es tan interesante...).

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López se encuentra casualmente con un antiguo amigo que ahora es manager musical. Para recordar los viejos tiempos, éste le propone relanzar su carrera de "rumbero" juvenil.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Marina quiere que David la acompañe a una expedición científica en alta mar. David, no sabe nadar pero se lo calla y se une a la expedición para no desilusionarla.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: "Radio Bofarull" esta a punto de cerrar por falta de audiencia. Ramón tiene una idea para salvarla: escribe un guión radiofónico sobre una fuga en la central nuclear.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David descubre que, para triunfar como actor, se necesita algo más que vocación. Se debe estar muy preparado. Por eso decide apuntarse a todo tipo de cursillos.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Lidia, exnovia de López, regresa embarazada del Amazonas y está a punto de dar a luz. Poco a poco, López se va implicando en los preparativos del parto bajo la mirada crítica de David.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López está emocionadísimo por su recién estrenada paternidad pero Lidia le comunica que se va a Brasil con la niña. David le monta una gran fiesta de despedida. Por fin las cosas regresarán a la normalidad.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Llega al Instituto del Treatro un nuevo profesor extranjero. Sus peculiares métodos crean polémica entre sus alumnos hasta el punto que Pol decide enfrentarse a él. David, en cambio, está encantado con sus clases.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: A López y a David les han embargado el piso por culpa de un crédito que López pidió para su padre y que éste no le devuelve.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David se queda encerrado en el lavabo. Carbonell intenta abrir la puerta pero es imposible; el inquilino anterior montó allí un refugio nuclear.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David toma conciencia de la degradación del medio ambiente y decide hacerse ecologista.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Las familias de López y David han hecho planes para celebrar las fiestas navideñas prescindiendo de ellos. Por ese motivo, los dos deciden pasar de las navidades y fingir que se trata de días normales.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Las familias de López y David han hecho planes para celebrar las fiestas navideñas prescindiendo de ellos. Por ese motivo, los dos deciden pasar de las navidades y fingir que se trata de días normales.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: La abuela de David se presenta por sorpresa y asegura que ha notado que está a punto de morirse y quiere que eso ocurra en casa de su nieto.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: La abuela Sunción aún vive en otra época. No entiende lo que significa vivir juntos sin estar casados o que dos amigos compartan piso para pagar el alquiler.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Quim Monzó pide a López que le escriba su próxima novela. Nadie debe enterarse. David quiere estrenarse como director de cine y empieza a preparar una película.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López se va de viaje a Cuba y regresa con una cubana. Está decidido a casarse con ella para que obtenga la nacionalidad española pero David se enamora perdidamente de ella. Los dos acabarán peleándose para acompañarla al altar.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Una compañía de teatro alternativo contrata a David como actor. Empiezan a tener problemas cuando les niegan la subvención que habían pedido y no saben de donde sacar el dinero para acabar de montar el espectáculo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López son un par de pesimistas y deciden espabilar a Emma porque creen que vive en un mundo feliz e irreal.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David consigue un papel en una serie de televisión. Su personaje ha sufrido un accidente y está en el hospital, muy enfermo y con el rostro desfigurado.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: La vida es sueño y los sueños, sueños son. El capítulo empieza con un sueño de López en el que aparece en situaciones muy inusuales hasta que se da cuenta de que se trata de un sueño.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López regresa a la universidad para conseguir el título de licenciado. Allí comprueba que los estudiantes de ahora no tienen nada que ver con los de su época.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Mientras ve una película, David tiene una revelación mística y creer que es Jesucristo. Vestido de Jesucristo, acaba convenciendo a todos sus amigos. Su primer milagro es la multiplicación del donut.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López y David están hartos de vivir juntos y deciden separarse. López se marcha del piso y encuentra otro, más pequeño y más caro.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Ha llegado el verano y todos tienen ganas de ir a la playa a ligar y a ponerse morenos. López y Ramón montan un stand de la radio en la playa pero deciden aparcar el trabajo e irse a ligar en tanga.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Ángel, el guardia urbano de la playa, busca a Emma para devolverle el zapato que perdió en verano y para decirle que la quiere.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: La abuela de David no puede dormir, está hiperactiva. El médico que va a visitarla le receta unas "hierbas" de maría. Todos deciden aprovechar la ocasión.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.sub-title: Tengo Toda La Vida Por Delante
programme.desc: Oriol, el padre de López, se jubila y se instala en casa de los chicos. La alegría de la jubilación le dura poco, en casa se aburre y esto le envejece prematuramente.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Stasky amplia las posibilidades del bar ofreciendo un servicio a domicilio. Emma se ofrece a llevar un pedido al Museo de cera pero, las horas pasan, y no regresa. David y Stasky van a buscarla.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.sub-title: Tinc Un Àngel de La Guarda
programme.desc: Para librarse de una multa, Emma dice que es la novia de Ángel, el guardia. Pero Ángel se entera de su mentira y decide que va a pagárselas todas juntas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma no sabe como decirle a Ángel que no quiere casarse con él. David y López tampoco creen que el matrimonio funcione. Quieren convencer a Emma de que no se case pero ella les dice que no se preocupen, que todo está controlado.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma y López llevan a Marujito a un concurso de canto de canarios porque están convencidos de que puede convertirse en una gran estrella.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Pol regresa a Barcelona por unos días y David está muy emocionado. Pero, al reencontrarse, se dan cuenta de que su relación de amistad ya no es como antes.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López conoce a Guillermina en un chat y se enamora. Pero, por culpa de una casualidad, Guillermina confunde a López con David y David decide no sacarla de su error.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Ahora que López y Guillermina son novios, nunca encuentran ni el momento ni el lugar para tener un poco de intimidad.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López tiene planeado un fantástico fin de semana con Guillermina pero todos apuestan que no serán capaces de aguantar tantas horas juntos.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López se quiere casar con Guillermina y se va a Finlandia a pedir los papeles del divorcio a Diana. Allí se despierta algo en su interior a ritmo de salsa.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Mientras López está en Finlandia, David y Guillermina se lían. A su regreso, David está muy extraño. Los remordimientos no le dejan vivir.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Josep López es locutor de radio en una emisora local. A sus treinta y cuatro años se da cuenta de que debe independizarse y empieza a buscarse un piso.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López se enteran de que a Emma le dan miedo las películas de terror y deciden aprovecharse. Esa noche, Emma va a quedarse a dormir en su piso y ellos traman un plan para hacer un trío con ella creyendo que ella aceptará a la primera.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Un nuevo becario llega a la radio en la que trabaja López. Es un chico que no acaba de funcionar; López intenta ayudarle pero lo único que consigue es que el chico se aproveche de él.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López quiere celebrar su cumpleaños con una gran fiesta pero David cree que ya es demasiado viejo para esas cosas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Pol, que está absolutamente convencido de ser homosexual, se enrolla con Emma y supone que no por eso dejará de serlo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Oriol, el padre hippy de López, se presenta en casa de su hijo y decide instalarse unos días. David queda realmente impresionado con Oriol, sería genial tener un padre así.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Ariadna, la hija de Mercedes, se enamora de López, que también queda prendado de ella. David le acusa de infanticida.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David recibe una carta del Ministerio de Defensa conforme debe ir a la mili. David pide a López que le espere y cuando regrese seguirán siendo compañeros de piso.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López queda para cenar con Ramón y con su mujer, Rosa. Durante la cena, Rosa no le dirige la palabra pero, a espaldas de Ramón, le tira los tejos.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Pol descubre que Emma está enamorada de López y les prepara una cita a través de un anónimo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David descubre que su madre tiene un amante y decide contárselo a su padre pero no sabe por donde empezar.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: López alquila una plaza de parking. Él no tiene ni coche ni carnet de conducir pero ese parece un buen sistema para planteárselo en serio e intentar sacárselo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López se han enamorado de Emma. Ninguno dejará que el otro la vea a solas y saque ventaja. Carbonell intenta vender a todo el mundo un viaje organizado por ella.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Carbonell, Ramón, Pol y Mercedes regresan del viaje. Ramón no para de contar que Pol le salvó la vida y que siempre estará en deuda con él.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma se ha ido. López y David están hechos polvo tras su marcha. Al enterarse de que el administrador del bloque busca un nuevo inquilino para la casita de madera, David y López salen desesperadamente en busca de Emma.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: David y López no saben qué hacer con un paquete de droga que les ha llegado por error. Si lo venden, pueden sacar mucho dinero pero si les pillan... aunque quizás deberían preocuparse por si su dueño lo reclama.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Emma quiere pedir el paro pero allí la convocan a un cursillo y debe pasar un examen. Carbonell y Mercedes le echarán una mano para que apruebe.

programme.title: Platos Sucios
programme.desc: Mercedes intenta hablar de un tema importante con López, que la esquiva constantemente por miedo a que le eche una bronca.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: Santa Margarta, Mallorca, el valor de lo autóctono
programme.desc: El resultado de los nuevos vinos que se obtienen tras el hallazgo de una auténtica caja de Pandora de variedades autóctonas de vid ha hecho más llevadero el arduo trabajo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: No sabemos qué beberían los pobladores del Monte Arabí, pero si los Romanos, que aquí dejaron profunda huella.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Tanto Tannat por domesticar Visitaremos Uruguay y recorreremos algunos de sus mejores viñedos y nos quedaremos impresionados de ver su evolución en el transcurso de tan pocos años.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La riqueza genética de las Garnachas. Ya por fin la Garnacha ha dejado de ser el patito feo de la uvas.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: El Corredor de Almansa, los vinos de Tintorera
programme.desc: Garnachas, hay muchas, pero la Tintorera de estas tierras es única.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: Los vinos de la Sierra de la Culebra
programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a viajar al pasado, vamos a descubrir la supervivencia de modos de vida tradicionales marcados por un profundo espíritu de colaboración entre sus habitantes.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: La Malvasía aromática de la Isla Bonita
programme.desc: En esta ocasión vamos a visitar la mundialmente célebre Isla Bonita, llamada así por su exuberante vegetación.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: Utiel-Requena En búsqueda del origen del vino español
programme.desc: Vamos a adentrarnos en la riquísima historia de una comarca que según se han sucedido los años ha pertenecido a diferentes reinos, que han marcado su economía y forma de vida.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: Málaga, desde el monte hasta la playa
programme.desc: Axarquía, Ronda, Manilva, Sierras de Málaga, posiblemente tienen un solo elemento en común, el cultivo de la uva, pero no se parecen en nada sus paisajes, ni formas de cultivo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Vamos a descubrir cómo esto ya no es necesariamente cierto y entenderemos los motivos para este cambio

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: El nombre de esta Denominación de Origen de Portugal quiere decir literalmente Vino Verde, por que sus uvas eran tradicionalmente vendimiadas verdes, para evitar los riesgos de la podredumbre.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La Margen Izquierda de Burdeos es la región más influyente del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Es difícil recorrer una isla de tantas formas como lo hemos hecho: en todo terreno, a pie, en camello, en drones y hasta debajo del agua.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.sub-title: Vinos del Altiplano: Jumilla y Valencia
programme.desc: En este episodio os quiero enseñar el lugar donde trabajo, Jumilla.

programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a conocer regiones fronterizas cargadas de historia.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En este primer capítulo de Chile, explicaremos la expansión del cultivo de la uva en el país sudamericano, y su evolución en los últimos años.

programme.desc: Recorreremos el Valle Central de California, desde las zonas frescas de la costa, hasta las más calurosas del interior.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Ribera de Duero, el vino de las fronteras Cultivados a partir de 600 metros de altura, sus viñedos tienen la brotación más tardía de Europa.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En una feria de vinos tuvimos la oportunidad de probar una botella de vino ¡con un genio dentro!

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: El gusto del vino no puede, o mejor dicho, no debe de estar reñido con el gusto del consumidor.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En los lindes atlánticos del continente europeo, y alrededor de la cosmopolita Lisboa, descubriremos singulares variedades y denominaciones de Portugal.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: ¿Dónde empieza y donde acaba una denominación de origen?

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Determinados estilos de vinos sólo se puedan elaborar en contados años, en los que se producen aparentes adversidades.

programme.title: Wineman

programme.title: Wineman

programme.title: Wineman

programme.desc: ¿Los Pirineos nos separan o nos unen a Francia?

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Hay testimonios de la presencia de la uva en Jumilla de hace 5.000 años.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Durante un año completo seremos testigos del ciclo de una vieja viña de Monastrell, sobre un suelo pobre y bajo un sol de justicia.

programme.desc: Descubriremos en este episodio por qué se decidió ubicar en El Hierro el más antiguo y longevo de los meridianos cero.

programme.title: Daisy Winters
programme.desc: La hija de 11 años de una mujer que lleva años luchando contra el cáncer trama junto a su mejor amiga una forma de escapar de tener que vivir finalmente con su dura y conservadora tía tras la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Un rostro desconocido
programme.desc: Tras la inesperada muerte de su marido, Shelley Stratton (Catherine Hicks) traslada a su hija Alexis (Emily Hirst) y a su hija adoptiva Laurie (Alexz Johnson) a su remota casa de verano para que su familia pueda empezar de nuevo. Cuando Laurie empieza a instalarse y a rehacer su vida, tiene la extraña sensación de que la vigilan constantemente.

programme.title: Hijos de Dune 2
programme.desc: Los gemelos de Paul Muad'dib Atreides se ven envueltos en el panorama político de Arrakis y del resto del universo.

programme.title: Miradas que matan
programme.desc: Basada en hechos reales, Faith se enorgullece de ser por fin policía en su ciudad natal, donde se une a Paul, su antiguo amor. Pronto se siente turbada y un poco decepcionada cuando él se involucra sentimentalmente con Jessica, una peligrosa belleza con un pasado criminal.

programme.title: El libro de navidad
programme.desc: Ember Morley, diseñadora gráfica y aspirante a ilustradora de libros de cuentos en Manhattan, ha heredado la granja de árboles de Navidad de su abuela. Ella regresa a su ciudad natal de Willow Hill para venderla antes de Navidad.

programme.title: Doble pecado
programme.desc: Jenn, la mujer de Bart Corbin, muere en su casa, aparentemente por suicidio, como cree la policía. Mientras él se instala con sus hijos pequeños Taylor y Trevor en casa de su hermano Bobby, su hermana Heather inicia una implacable campaña, sin ninguna pista, para hacer creer a la policía que Bart debió asesinarla y tuvo un romance con la secretaria de la consulta, Dara.

programme.title: Un asesino en el segundo piso
programme.desc: Una madre protege a su hijastra después de que la adolescente presenciara el asesinato de su mejor amiga, pero pronto se ve obligada a enfrentarse a la aterradora posibilidad de que su hijastra sea la verdadera asesina.

programme.title: Anillo del Engano
programme.desc: Desde que falleció su marido, Julie no había vuelto a salir con ningún otro hombre, hasta que conoce a Martin, un hombre apuesto. Pero tras esa apariencia se esconde un oscuro pasado.

programme.title: La copa
programme.desc: La carrera de caballos de la Copa de Melbourne 2002, el amor fraternal y el triunfo del espíritu humano. Una historia real.

programme.title: Paraíso robado
programme.desc: Una brillante ingeniera planea demandar después de que un colega suyo le robara su innovador diseño aeronáutico y lo patentara. Cuando más tarde lo encuentran asesinado, ella se convierte en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: La boda en los Hamptons
programme.desc: Jenna es una diseñadora de moda que trabaja para la boutique de su amiga. Su malogrado negocio fue salvado por una famosa influencer. Cuando Jenna acude a una fastuosa boda en los Hamptons, la confunden con ella, pero decide acompañarla.

programme.title: Viviendo con una extraña
programme.desc: El sueño de Kaylene Larsen finalmente se hizo realidad, hermosos gemelos de un procedimiento in vitro. Pero cuando Kaylene necesita atención domiciliaria, la enfermera que contrata no es otra que la propia donante de óvulos.

programme.title: Caza de jefes
programme.desc: En Duisburgo, un restaurador italiano y cuatro de sus colaboradores son ejecutados. Las huellas conducen a un pueblo de Italia, de donde son originarias todas las víctimas.

programme.title: La verdadera historia de Hamlet, príncipe de Dinamarca
programme.desc: Una antigua leyenda nórdica de venganza, poder y espíritu humano, que posteriormente inspiró a William Shakespeare en su tragedia: Hamlet.

programme.title: La verdadera historia de Hamlet, príncipe de Dinamarca
programme.desc: Una antigua leyenda nórdica de venganza, poder y espíritu humano, que posteriormente inspiró a William Shakespeare en su tragedia: Hamlet.

programme.title: A Christmas Masquerade
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre de negocios la confunde con su jefe en un baile de máscaras, continúa con la treta durante las Navidades. Su misión es conseguirle un cliente. Cuando las motivaciones de él se revelan, ambos se dan cuenta de que podría tratarse de amor.

programme.title: El puente de San Luis Rey
programme.desc: En el Perú de 1714, un fraile es juzgado por la Inquisición por cuestionar las intenciones de Dios cuando cinco personas mueren en el derrumbe de un puente de cuerdas andino.

programme.title: La decisión de Gracie
programme.desc: Una madre de dudosa reputación es detenida en presencia de sus cinco hijos.

programme.title: Intercambio mortal
programme.desc: Una chica intenta destruir la vida de una nueva conocida y reemplazarla en su familia.

programme.title: Todo o amor
programme.desc: Una escritora de novelas románticas prepara una nueva ambientada en la guerra. Su editora decide que para documentarse debe hacer un curso de entrenamiento militar con las fuerzas especiales.

programme.title: Camino a Paloma
programme.desc: Jason Momoa, conocido por Game of Thrones y The Red Road, debuta como director y protagoniza esta intensa road movie interpretando a Wolf, un nativo americano que huye tras vengar el asesinato de su madre. Mientras cruza el desolado oeste estadounidense en su motocicleta, descubrirá que la justicia tiene un precio: la búsqueda de redención de Wolf revelará secretos y lo llevará por un camino lleno de giros inesperados.

programme.title: La niñera
programme.desc: Después de que su vecina Teri se ofrezca a hacer de canguro de su hija y la niña desaparezca, Susan tendrá que revisar la muerte de su marido para rescatarla.

programme.title: El secreto de su hijo
programme.desc: Matt desaparece mientras jugaba con su hermano en un lago y deja a su familia sin consuelo. Diez años más tarde y tras la muerte de su padre, aparece un niño que asegura ser el joven desaparecido.

programme.title: El anillo de Sofía
programme.desc: Madison Byrne es una joven y bella experta en arte que intenta ayudar a Jack Singer, un adinerado mecenas de su museo, a desvelar el misterio de un anillo antiguo.

programme.title: Dos chefs y una tarta nupcial
programme.desc: Sigue a una crítica gastronómica en la cima de su carrera cuando conoce a un chef famoso por rechazar a los críticos gastronómicos en su restaurante. Deberán superar sus diferencias antes de la boda de la hermana de ella.

programme.title: Era un hombre silencioso
programme.desc: Un oficinista desquiciado que planeaba llevar a cabo un tiroteo en su lugar de trabajo lucha con su nueva condición de héroe después de que termina deteniendo un tiroteo en su lugar.

programme.title: Exploradores, en compañía de extraños
programme.desc: Tres compañías de paracaidistas viajan en una misión mortal a Francia para preparar la zona de lanzamiento del ataque aerotransportado del Día D. Tienen que instalar un transmisor Eureka y un reflector para guiar a los aviones en la invasión de Normandía.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: Un siglo después del fatídico viaje del original, zarpa el moderno transatlántico de lujo Titanic II. ¿Sufrirá este barco el mismo destino que su homónimo?

programme.title: Dal Primo Goal Al Podio Nerazzurro | I Primi 171 Goal Di Lautaro Martinez
programme.desc: 171 gol, 171 urla di gioia: Lautaro Martinez continua a stupire, a emozionare e scrivere nuove pagine del libro dei record nerazzurri

programme.title: Memorabilia Matthaus
programme.desc: “Memorabilia” è il racconto di una carriera straordinaria attraverso le parole di una leggenda nerazzurra. Emozioni, ricordi e momenti indelebili che hanno segnato la storia dell’Inter e del calcio.

programme.title: Serie A Udinese-Inter 2025/2026 1T
programme.desc: Vittoria pesantissima per l'Inter in trasferta: decisivo il gol di Lautaro al 20' del primo tempo su assist di Esposito.

programme.desc: Continua il percorso in Coppa Italia dell'Inter: i ragazzi di Chivu battono 2-1 il Torino nei quarti e si qualificano per la semifinale.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.sub-title: London Lee, Alan King, Irwin C. Watson, Jean Carroll
programme.desc: London Lee's Dating; Alan King's Kids Getting a Dog; Irwin C. Watson's Wife and Heart.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: No one knows why actress Lana Clarkson decided to go to music producer Phil Spector's home for a nightcap, but they do know that by the end of the night she was dead; Spector claims she committed suicide, but the evidence says otherwise.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.sub-title: California v. Lyle and Erik Menendez
programme.desc: People couldn't imagine what made Erik and Lyle Menendez brutally murder their parents; the prosecution said it was greed and the defense said something much darker; a family secret that would shock and grip the nation.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Michael Jackson's personal doctor Conrad Murray took an oath to first do no harm, but that's exactly what prosecutors say Murray did when Jackson died from an overdose of a powerful anesthesia drug.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Rebecca Schaeffer was talented, pretty, and had her whole life ahead of her when she unknowingly opened the door of her Hollywood apartment to her killer Robert Bardo; Bardo's lawyers say his mental illness caused him to snap.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: Another family member takes the stand, giving more emotional testimony about the Murdaugh family dynamic; she is Maggie's sister and describes her role in raising Paul and Buster over the years.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: Both sides in Alex Murdaugh's murder trial argue about the issue of infidelity; the jury wasn't in the courtroom for this, but it interrupted the testimony of Maggie Murdaugh's only sister who had been telling jurors about Maggie and Paul.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: The lead investigator who looked into the murders of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh takes the stand; he led the final police interview of Alex Murdaugh about two months after the killings.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: Investigators working the double homicide of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh also looked into the fatal boat crash that Paul was accused in, which was a big part of this case.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: The jury watched an unedited version of Alex Murdaugh's final police interview. It lasted an hour and a half. And it included questions about Alex's alibi for the time Maggie and Paul were killed.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: A detective from SLED was the centerpiece to the State's case against Alex Murdaugh accusing him of killing his wife, Maggie, and son, Paul; David Owen was the lead investigator and helped the prosecution button up its case.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: The special agent assigned as the lead detective in this case tells the jury about his agency's investigation into the murders of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh.

programme.title: Deadly Parade Crash Trial
programme.desc: Police recovered 65 videos from people, businesses and the city of Waukesha, Wisconsin; according to police, Darrell Brooks passed a street on the left where he could have exited during the deadly parade crash.

programme.title: Deadly Parade Crash Trial
programme.desc: Darrell Brooks has a range of questions for the lead detective on the stand in his trial; some were relevant, some were not; in the end, six people are dead and 61 injured.

programme.title: Deadly Parade Crash Trial
programme.sub-title: Defendant and Judge Go at It
programme.desc: Darrell Brooks has another blow up with judge Jennifer Dorow just as the prosecution nears the end of its case; the State claims Brooks was trying to delay the trial because he knew a conviction was coming.

programme.title: Deadly Parade Crash Trial
programme.desc: The State rests its case; the process goes longer than anticipated as the prosecution accused Darrell Brooks of using delay tactics; he decides to represent himself against the 76 felony counts against him in the deadly parade crash.

programme.title: Deadly Parade Crash Trial
programme.desc: Darrell Brooks calls his first witness in his case; it is his turn to tell his side of the story as he alludes to in his opening statement; Brooks pleads not guilty to all 76 felony counts, that includes those charges in the deaths of six people.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: David Coffin's house burned down with him in it, but it wasn't the fire that killed him, it was the bullet in his head; investigators immediately focused on Scott Davis, the estranged husband of Coffin's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: When the bodies of Ruby Joyner and Halima Jones were discovered beaten, strangled and shot, police turned to someone they both knew; but Lewis Joyner was nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Cheerleader on Trial for Baby's Murder
programme.desc: The Defense's OB-GYN expert wraps up his testimony; before the next expert testifies for the defense, the judge holds a hearing outside the presence of the jury.

programme.title: Cheerleader on Trial for Baby's Murder
programme.desc: Alan Hirsch, an interrogation expert, states that investigators used an aggressive technique in their police interviews of Skylar Richardson which led her to give a false confession; the jury hears the character testimony.

programme.title: Cheerleader on Trial for Baby's Murder
programme.desc: A mental health evaluation of the defendant gets outlined for jurors; according to the defense's psychologist, Skylar Richardson submits to authority.

programme.title: Cheerleader on Trial for Baby's Murder
programme.desc: Steward Bassman makes the diagnosis that Skylar Richardson is suffering from a dependent personality disorder; the prosecutor questions Bassman on neonaticide, the deliberate act of a parent murdering their child during the first 24 hours of life.

programme.title: Cheerleader on Trial for Baby's Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Levaughn concludes that the manner of death in Annabelle's demise as a homicide was incorrect; he tells the jury that the autopsy report performed on the baby's remains had it all wrong.

programme.title: Trial & Error: Why Did O.J. Win?
programme.desc: Did O.J. Simpson have enough time to murder Nicole Brown and Ron Goldman?; the defense dissected the timeline to raise reasonable doubt; Detective Tom Lange and prosecutor Bill Hodgman explain their window of opportunity.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Rabbi Fred Neulander was a pillar of his Cherry Hill, New Jersey community - the founder of a synagogue, a father and a husband. Little did anyone know, he was also an adulterer, one capable of hiring a hitman to murder his own wife.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Melanie McGuire made a living bringing life into the world as a fertility clinic nurse; the police accused her of shooting her husband, dismembering his body and disposing of it in suitcases dumped into the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Rutgers freshman Tyler Clementi and Dharun Ravi had only been roommates for few weeks when Ravi decided to secretly film Tyler kissing another man; soon after, Clementi took his own life and Ravi faced surprising criminal charges.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: The murders of Voncile Smith and her sons John and Richard set Pensacola, Florida on edge; the courts try to decide if this was an occult ritual or something much more basic: greed.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: The Defense tried to poke holes in the police investigation of the murders of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh. SLED Special Agent David Owen testified that the evidence they collected pointed to only one person.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: SLED Special Agent David Owen continues his testimony; he was assigned to look into the murders of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh, that involved collecting evidence and following up on important clues.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: As the police investigated the murders of Maggie and Paul Murdaugh, prosecutors claimed that Alex Murdaugh made another attempt to distract the public.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: The arrests and the charges against Alex Murdaugh piled up after the murders of Maggie and Paul. First, the financial accusations got him in handcuffs.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: State investigators put together a comprehensive timeline of events for the day that Maggie and Paul Murdaugh were killed. The jury heard about the cellphone and GPS data they used to create it.

programme.title: SC v. Alex Murdaugh
programme.desc: SLED investigators map it all out using data from their phones during the six hours before and after their deaths; they say they traced Alex Murdaugh's sudden movements right after the shootings.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.sub-title: GA v. Crowder & Stanton - The Tomato Patch Murder
programme.desc: Sixty-four-year-old Thurman Martin ruled his family with an iron fist, brutally beating anyone who dared stand up to his emotional and physical abuse; then one day he vanished, his family telling police he'd left with just a few changes of clothing.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.sub-title: KY v. Monroe - Bourbon, Bullets, And Betrayal
programme.desc: Vicki and Gerald Monroe's dream of owning and operating a Louisville bar together came to a tragic end when Vicki found her husband shot dead and the cash register emptied in an apparent robbery.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: A detective testifying recalls processing the defendant's car; he says he came across a fake driver's license which indicated Melanie McGuire was a Pennsylvania resident.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: The detective on the stand tells the jury about the family drama between Bill and Melanie McGuire; after she was arrested and accused of killing bill, there was a custody battle over her two sons which pitted her against Bill's relatives.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: Douglas Deedrick concludes that fibers found on the bullet in the remains of Bill, were consistent with pillow fibers; a forensic document examiner testified.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: A forensic document examiner testified about forged signatures for a drug medication. Police contended that Melanie McGuire forged a signature to get a prescription for a sedative. She was accused of using that drug to knock Bill.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: Prosecutors call an Atlantic City casino supervisor to the stand; before Bill McGuire was killed, he was known to go gambling at the Taj Mahal casino.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: A casino supervisor from Atlantic City testifies that Bill McGuire won more than 30-thousand dollars gambling the year before he was murdered; Melanie McGuire's defense pushes the idea that Bill's gambling habit got him killed.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: The jury learns about the DNA analysis done on the key crime scene evidence; prosecutors seem to rely heavily on circumstantial evidence that links Melanie to Bill McGuire's disappearance and death according to them.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: The State's DNA expert is under cross examination; investigators have done forensic exams on Bill McGuire's abandoned car, as well as on stamps, envelopes and packages; all of this is done to try to find evidence linking Melanie.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.sub-title: Extracting and Solidifying the Hard Evidence
programme.desc: Jurors listen to more expert testimony in the field of forensic science; investigators made a flow chart of forensic evidence collected in this case.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: The police trace the movements of Melanie McGuire on the day her husband, Bill, went missing; the state investigator who timed the route she took, is testified, to try to prove that she could have pulled off the murder of her husband.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer Murder Trial
programme.desc: Melanie McGuire's sister-in-law's thoughts about she and Bill being the perfect couple; during cross-examination, the Defense brings out even more family drama.

programme.title: Trial & Error: Why Did O.J. Win?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elizabeth and her husband, Bob, claim that Elizabeth’s 20-year-old daughter, Ali, is a “spoiled brat,” who refuses to go to college or get a job, has trashed their house and also steals from them. Dr. Phil has some tough questions for Ali about her behavior -- and for the parents, who admit they’ve enabled their daughter. Can Ali learn to stand on her own two feet?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From marital spats to parenting disagreements, learn the biggest mistakes you're making.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents seek Dr. Phil's help for an out-of-control teen.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
programme.desc: Parents say their daughter's home is unsafe for grandson.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Children accuse their dad of neglect.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: A Teen Girl Obsessed With Her Ex
programme.desc: A teen girl so obsessed with her on-again, off-again boyfriend that he claims she has become a stalker, forcing him to get a restraining order… for three years! Cristie says her 19-year-old daughter Corryn started dating 17-year-old Jack almost two years ago and every time they break up, Corryn becomes a “crazy ex-girlfriend.” Jack claims Corryn calls him hundreds of times a day, breaks into his house and hides behind the bushes to watch his every move, each time violating the restraining order. But Corryn says Jack plays games with her and lures her to him every time. Cristie and Jack’s mom, Brytt, say they’ve had it and want their teens’ relationship to end today -- but what does Corryn have to say about that? Can she stop obsessing over Jack, and will she keep a promise she made to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet a “runaway bride” who’s already called off five weddings and she’s only 26! Then, meet another guest who’s frustrated because her fiancé won’t set a wedding date. He's canceled two previous engagements and says marriage "freaks him out." What does the future hold for these two? Plus, a heartbroken woman whose fiancé called the wedding off a month before her big day. Should she wait for him to come around? Find out what every bride needs to know before walking down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Contemporary weddings have turned into five-star productions, with couples pulling out all the stops to shine on their special day. But what happens when the bride or groom-to-be starts making diva-like demands? Mike and Jamie agreed to a small Vegas wedding, but that went out the window when Jamie switched her gown three times, rented a limo to drive her one block and upgraded her engagement ring. Mike says that Jamie also made him uninvite all of his friends and cancelled his bachelor party! Are Jamie’s antics a hint of what’s to come in their marriage? Then, Nastassia complains that her husband-to-be, Richard, is cheap. She says he wants her to buy bridal flowers from the grocery store, have her mom sew her gown and even schedule the wedding before year's end so he can get a tax write-off! Will Richard’s tightwad ways force Nastassia to call off the wedding?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rheta says her four-and-a-half-year marriage to Mark is headed down a rocky road, and her mother-in-law, Deb, is in the driver's seat. Rheta says it's time for Mark to cut the cord with the woman she calls deceitful, backstabbing, sneaky and controlling -- or else! Meanwhile, Deb says she hates Rheta, claiming she's violent, trashy and undeserving of her son. The tension between the women has escalated to blows on more than one occasion, leaving Mark literally in the middle. Where do his loyalties lie? Hear the drastic measures Deb has taken to get Rheta out of their lives. And, did Rheta reveal a secret in the hopes of ruining Deb's 31-year marriage? Is this a case of an overprotective mom overstepping her boundaries, or a wife's resentment getting the best of her? Dr. Phil mediates this war of words and helps to draw some lines in the sand. Whose side will Mark be on? Can this marriage and family be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How well do you know your neighbors, your friends or even your child's teacher? An estimated four to eight million people in North America are swinging in the suburbs " mostly middle-class folks from all walks of life. Dr. Phil takes you inside the secret world of swingers, a lifestyle where couples swap partners.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The saga of a father's quest for his vanished daughter is discussed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sixty-four-year-old Josie says she met the love of her life, Victor, on Facebook. Even though he’s Nigerian, 30 years younger, and she’s never physically met him, she insists it’s true love. She’s purchased a ticket to Nigeria and hopes to marry Victor, but her older sister, Carmen, her best friend, Angela, and her 19-year-old son, Anthony, say Josie is acting like a teenage fool. They believe Victor is conning Josie into marrying him for a green card. Dr. Phil took cameras to Nigeria to find Victor to see if he’s telling Josie the truth. Josie’s family says they want Dr. Phil to convince Josie that this relationship will never work. Is Victor who he says he is, and will Josie leave for Nigeria after hearing what Dr. Phil has to say?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Em says her husband, Shawn, has cheated on her with at least 78 women -- so why does she keep taking him back? Shawn admits to at least 20 affairs but says it’s his wife’s fault that he strays.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Many women are itching to run to the altar, but Dr. Phil’s guests say they’re ready to run for the hills! Kelly is a self-proclaimed runaway bride. She’s been engaged four times but says she gets cold feet before she makes it down the aisle. Rick, her current fiancé, proposed four years ago and is still waiting for her to set a wedding date. Kelly believes that most marriages end in divorce, and she doesn’t want to become another statistic. Should Rick wait for her to make up her mind, or should he cut his losses and move on? Then, Chad and Candi have been engaged for over five years and have two daughters, but Chad says he’s not ready to tie the knot. He says weddings are too expensive, but Candi says he racked up $49,000 in loans for a car, a camper and a new deck for the house. Will Chad break down and give his fiancée the wedding of her dreams? Plus, Dr. Phil talks to a woman who says her fiancé left her six days before the wedding and stuck her with a $150,000 bill -- an allegation he totally denies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach — today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Our Son is a Violent Mooch
programme.desc: A couple want to evict their violent 31-year-old son, while their son blames his parents for his financial struggles.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil debates viewers who disagree with the advice he gave to previous guests. One woman feels he had no right to push his view of adoption on pregnant 15-year-old, Alexandra. Another woman accuses Dr. Phil of bullying the participants on the Weight Loss Challenge and even accuses him of disliking fat people! What does Dr. Phil say about her inflated accusations? Then a 16-year-old bi-racial girl disputes Dr. Phil’s advice to a mother facing a racial identity crisis. How will these viewers fare when they go head to head with Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brenda says she fell in love with and married her husband, Don – despite their 26-year age gap. But soon after, she claims her “Prince Charming” turned “crazy” and “temperamental.” Is their age difference at the root of their issues? Then, Bev says she’s concerned for her sister, Melanie, who married her much younger man, Devar, after meeting him on a Jamaican vacation. Is Devar in it for love, or for a green card and money? And, Dr. Phil catches up with best-selling author Mitch Albom.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: How to Get to I Do
programme.desc: For many girls, a fairytale wedding day is a sweet fantasy -- but getting the proposal can be a real nightmare! Amber and Rich are struggling through commitment issues. They live, work and have children together, and say they're happy but can't seem to take the next step. Rich sold Amber on his plan to marry her after five years, so why hasn't he proposed after nearly seven? Does he have valid reasons for resisting marriage? After Dr. Phil challenges him, will Rich decide to walk down the aisle ... on Dr. Phil's stage? Next, Jill has taken the leap and been divorced seven times. Why does she pick the wrong men, and what can she do to make her next union last? Then, Candy describes her first marriage as lasting 18 miserable years, and she regrets how she poisoned her daughters against men during that time. What will it take to change her daughter, who calls herself the Runaway Bride? Plus, a don't-miss moment happens in Dr. Phil's audience!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Craig and Cherie say the last half of their 16-year marriage has been anything but happily-ever-after. Cherie says Craig is chauvinistic, verbally abusive and demands sex, which she admits she only gives him about three to four times a year. Craig says Cherie withholds sex to control him, and as a result, he has become a slave to his anger. Cherie fears the tension in their household is taking a toll on their 11-year-old daughter, who is often caught in the crossfire of their fighting. Dr. Phil challenges the couple to a communication test. Can they heal their wounds and rekindle their romance? Then, meet the couple who inspired the movie, The Vow. Shortly after Kim and Krickitt Carpenter were married, a terrible car crash changed everything. Krickitt lay in a coma for weeks, and awoke with no recognition of her husband. The couple shares their inspiring, though oftentimes heartbreaking, journey of falling in love all over again. How did they find their way back to each other? And what is it like seeing their lives played out on the big screen? If you’ve ever wondered whether love can survive the toughest of challenges, you won’t want to miss this show! This show contains strong sexual content. Viewer discretion advised.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From the outside, Jason and Shani had the perfect marriage " a big, beautiful house on the lake and three adorable boys " but recently Jason was crushed to learn that Shani's been having an affair with a mutual friend. Now, Shani is torn between her husband and her lover. What would you do?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Cherylyn says she loves living the high life and admits she is a spoiled and entitled“princess”who has spent tens of thousands of other people’s money on her lavish lifestyle. Cherylyn says she maxed out her 19 credit cards on designer shoes, handbags, purses, clothes, makeup and pampering! And, Cherylyn says she insists on fine dining, fast cars and her boyfriend, Tyler, footing the bill. However, Tyler says he has nothing more to give Cherylyn except an ultimatum, which he delivers when he comes face-to-face with her onstage. Cherylyn's mom, Joey, says that her selfish and manipulative daughter has blown over $130,000 in less than a year and her spending has left a trail of devastation which includes pawning over $7,000 worth of family heirlooms and stealing her identity. Sparks fly when Cherylyn defends her entitled behavior during the taping. What jaw-dropping statement does an unrepentant Cherylyn make to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Living with an alcoholic parent is one of the most difficult and heart-wrenching experiences a child can go through. Heather, 28, and Alexandra, 21, say their mother, Joey, is a pathetic drunk, and if she doesn't get clean once and for all, they will walk away from her forever.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents express frustration with their twin sons' disrespectful behavior.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: From Making Millions to Garage Life
programme.desc: Mike and Vicki say their 37-year-old son, Ryan, was once making millions running a successful real estate company, but for the past three months, he has been living in their garage, on their dime, along with his 24-year-old girlfriend, Rachel. The parents claim Ryan is a “freeloader” who sleeps all day, acts entitled, picks fights and even leaves them to care for his 5-year-old son. Ryan admits things are chaotic in his life but insists it’s not all his fault. Why does he say his parents are partly to blame for his business failing? Dr. Phil has some tough questions for Ryan about his behavior -- does he take any accountability? And, hear from Rachel -- is she happy with their living situation? Plus, Ryan isn’t the only one staying with mom and dad -- you won’t believe how many mouths Mike and Vicki say they are feeding! How can the parents stop the bleeding and take back control of their lives? And, is Ryan ready to step up to the plate and work toward living on his own?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: My Spoiled, Lazy, Adult Rapper Son
programme.desc: Cindy and Jim say they are fed up with their 35-year-old son, Brandon. They say he’s a moocher who refuses to get job, wears superhero costumes on a daily basis, and has caused $15,000 in damages to their property. Brandon says his parents don’t understand how his mind works. He admits to wearing superhero costumes and going on nightly “Batman” vigilante missions. Brandon says he also created a rapper persona named “Ceeza Caprice” and considers himself a “God MC” who can rap to any beat. Brandon’s sister, Harmony, says she blames her parents for Brandon’s behavior. She says they enable Brandon. She claims Brandon is a manipulator who sees it as a challenge to live off others.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alex says he will do absolutely anything to live his “bad and boujee” lifestyle. He admits he lies, cheats, and steals thousands of dollars from friends, family, and even strangers, just so he can live a lifestyle which includes shopping, tanning, and getting his hair done. Alex says he wants to become famous for his “twerking videos,” but until then, he believes his family should be taking care of him because he’s “just 26-year-old!” Alex’s mother, Kimberly, and sister, Elizabeth, say nothing about Alex’s life is glamorous, and claim he's addicted to drugs and a criminal. They claim Alex shows no remorse for any of his actions, even though he has stolen so much from his mother that she claims she will be homeless within the year! Can Dr. Phil get through to Alex? Will Alex ever change his “bad and boujee” ways? Find out!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There comes a point when every child must grow up and face life on their own. For today’s guests, that time has come and gone and they want stay with Mom and Dad! You’ll meet Ryan, whose father says he’s borrowed over $10,000, and has trouble standing on his own two feet. And watch as Dr. Phil gives another young adult the tools she needs to create a life of her own. Find out what needs to happen before your offspring fly the coop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Adult Kids Who Won’t Move Out
programme.desc: Witness the “boomerang effect...” Dr. Phil talks to parents whose adult children keep coming back to live with, and off of them. One couple says their sons refuse to move out even though they are both almost 30-years-old. One 25- year-old is unemployed, has had 16 jobs in seven years, lives with his mother and even took her credits cards to charge up two thousand dollars worth of “stuff.” Dr. Phil helps these adult children address their issues so they can stop their destructive patterns.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did you know that close to 14 million adults still live at home with their parents? Dr. Phil’s first guest is 30 years old, has 2 kids, and is still living with her mom! Her mom wants her out, so why won’t she leave? Then, meet one mother who made her son sign a contract to move out for good. The deadline has lapsed, but he won’t budge. How far will Dr. Phil go to push him out of the nest? Plus, meet a couple who opened their home to 21 family members over the last 7 years. Finally, their nephew came to stay for a couple of days…and two years later he’s still there!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did you know that close to 14 million adults still live at home with their parents? Dr. Phil’s first guest is 30 years old, has 2 kids, and is still living with her mom! Her mom wants her out, so why won’t she leave? Then, meet one mother who made her son sign a contract to move out for good. The deadline has lapsed, but he won’t budge. How far will Dr. Phil go to push him out of the nest? Plus, meet a couple who opened their home to 21 family members over the last 7 years. Finally, their nephew came to stay for a couple of days…and two years later he’s still there!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Meddling Mother-in-Law or a Lying Cheating Daughter-in-Law? Dr Phil delves into the family drama.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are concerned about the extreme measures their daughters take to get and keep a boyfriend.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman attempts to confront her cheating husband with his alleged mistresses.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shares advice for dealing with rude, crude and obnoxious behavior from your family members.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to speak with parents, Liz and Jim, about why each blames the other for their son’s drug addiction. Liz says she blames what she calls Jim’s abusive parenting philosophy for their son retreating to drugs, which Jim vehemently denies. Find out what happens when Jim faces his daughter, Chloe, and son, Nic. Will they support their mother’s accusations against their father?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Everyone knows people that love to bicker. But what happens when the bickering escalates into verbal abuse and violence? Dr. Phil checks in with past guests Troy and Tammy whose explosive arguing is the primary dynamic in their marriage. Have they been able to break the cycle of drama or are they one step closer to divorce? Then—meet a single mother of five who worries that her children’s bickering may lead to fatal consequences! She thinks they’re out of control. So why is her daughter pointing the finger at her? Dr. Phil helps her end the fighting once and for all.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Would you rather be right or happy? Dr. Phil talks with some right-fighters who can't settle their debate.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: “He loves me. He loves me not.” Wouldn’t it be great if there was a formula to get your partner to commit? Josie has been dating Curry for more than three years, and she says she’s ready to dump him if he doesn’t pop the question soon. Curry says he loves his girlfriend, so why is he afraid to walk down the aisle? Will Josie hold out for a ring, or will she kick this commitment-phobe to the curb? Then, Melissa thought she had it all –- the ring, the dress and the man of her dreams –- until she discovered her wedding was a sham. She says her husband, John, lied about how many times he’d been married, but the biggest tale of all is that he’s still married to another woman! John admits that he lied about being divorced, but says Melissa wouldn’t have stayed with him if he told her the truth. Will Melissa ever be able to trust him again ... and should she? Plus, meet a couple who says their dream wedding turned into a nightmare when the wedding planner scammed them out of $30,000.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Daniel Pelosi was convicted of second-degree murder in the slaying of investment banker and multimillionaire Ted Ammon -- the husband of his lover, Generosa. He is currently serving 25 years to life but now claims he is ready to explain what really happened the night of the murder. Dr. Phil visits Pelosi behind bars.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents Liz and Jim say their 16-year-old son, Nic, has a serious drug problem that has such a hold on him, they claim he even stole $75,000 in gold from his parents’ safe and spent it all on drugs! But, Liz says she is convinced that her husband is to blame. Liz accuses Jim of being a narcissist and misogynist, whose parenting philosophy is based on intimidation and abuse, and claims that is what drove their son to drugs. Jim denies Liz’s allegations, claiming she has gone to great lengths to paint him as a villain. He says she is the major problem, and calls her the world's lousiest parent and a doormat who helped enable Nic's deadly addictions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany says her relationship with her son’s father, Erik, was destroyed by his constant lying and empty promises, to the point where she completely cut him off and has not seen him in over three years. Erik admits he has lied to his ex-girlfriends. Then, just this past year, Erik dated Sheka who says after doing research midway through their relationship, she uncovered his lies and put a stop to their wedding plans. So, when did Erik begin to con and deceive people? As Erik is accused of one lie more shocking than the next, his mom, Jody, says her son has been lying since he was a child. And, don't miss part 2, when more women come forward from Erik’s past.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents: If your teen talks back, acts out or is just plain rude, you better tune in!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A divorced couple secretly remarries, but did they make a mistake- again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when you can't let go of a meaningful relationship from the past? What are the boundaries when getting in touch with an old flame while you're married? Although toying with old flames can get you burned, it can also be the spark that rekindles lost love.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
programme.desc: The family of a 16-year-old self-professed gang member comes together to urge the teen to turn his life around. And, two former gang members have an important message for the teen -- Is he ready to walk away from the gang life for good?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda Knox spent four years locked in an Italian prison for the murder of her British roommate Meredith Kercher. Dubbed “Foxy Knoxy” by the press, she became one of the most famous cases of wrongful conviction. She tells her story, as she fights to save the life of Texas death row inmate Rodney Reed. This program contains graphic discussion about a criminal case. Viewer discretion advised.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you think pretty people are immune to heartache, think again. The headlines are filled with stories of striking women who were devastated by infidelity, despite their outward beauty. Dr. Phil sits down with Joey, a husband and father, who says he can’t pass up a pretty face. His wife, Shannon, says he’s slept with close to 100 women since their wedding day. The personal trainer justifies his actions by saying Shannon is overweight and not hot enough for him. Will he get a wake-up call about his cheating ways? Or will his wife take him back yet again? See the shocking text messages to Joey’s mistress, and hear Dr. Phil’s strong message for the hapless husband when a disturbing secret is revealed. Can Dr. Phil encourage Joey to choose another path and look beyond the physical?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
programme.desc: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she’s not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace.Dr. Phil says Bridget is a parent in denial and in need of a wake-up call. He sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Dad Accused of Faking His Own Death
programme.desc: A man's claim of his father's disappearance leads to a shoking decption.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A mom is supposed to love and nurture her children, but what if she's too involved? Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling, manipulative and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration, not mourning. He claims she uses bribes to control his every move, including offering him $20,000 to divorce his first wife. Margaret admits that she can be pushy and difficult but says she just wants to see her son succeed in life. Is she really setting him up for failure? Does Reed really want to man-up and break free from his mother's grasp? And, is Margaret willing to let him go? Then, 35-year-old Anthony, star of the new TLC reality show Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home and letting his mom, Patti, wait on him hand and foot. How does Patti feel about their living arrangement? Will she ever kick Anthony out? Plus, hear how Anthony's lifestyle affects his dating life. If you know of a mother-son bond that's a little too close for comfort, don't miss this Dr. Phil. Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration. Margaret says she wants to see her son succeed - but is she setting him up for failure? Plus, 35-year-old Anthony, star of TLC's Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meleah and Greg's young love story started and ended like so many. But when Meleah discovered she was pregnant following their breakup, their lives became forever intertwined. Watch as sparks fly when they face off! Plus, Paige was a teen mom struggling to make ends meet. You won't want to miss her remarkable update!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
programme.desc: "I wanted to make someone jealous." "I was bored." "I wanted to feel closer to God." These are just a few of the 237 reasons why women say they have sex. Author and clinical psychologist Dr. Cindy Meston and Dr. Jennifer Berman, a sexual health expert, join Dr. Phil to talk about women and sex, and offer advice to couples with differing libidos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In part two, the estranged husband of missing mom, Julie Ann Gonzalez, takes a polygraph test.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are we raising a generation of ungrateful children? Melissa’s sisters say her sons are the most spoiled boys in North America. They get everything they want – all they have to do is whine. Melissa says her kids just like toys, and she thinks her sisters may be jealous of her lifestyle. Next, Dori admits that her 13-year-old son, Parker, is spoiled. Parker says he won't take no for an answer, and even has a strategy for getting everything he wants. Find out what's behind Dori's need to spoil Parker. Then, Joan says her 14-year-old daughter, Jacquie, is a snob, and her need for trendy clothes is turning her into a materialistic monster. Plus, Lauren spends her entire paycheck shopping, but with no money in her checking account, she’s afraid she could be headed for trouble. Her mom, Diane, says she's not worried, it's just Lauren's way of relaxing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A viral video depicting a judge whipping his daughter sparks outrage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Destoni’s Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
programme.desc: Dr. Phil wants a violent teen to meet someone who could change her life. How will she react?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Christina, who emailed him desperate for help for her daughter, Tara, who she says can be an angry monster. Christina left the home when Tara was 13 years old, but now, she says she's worried that her daughter is in a toxic situation with the ex-husband she calls narcissistic and his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Today, meet the new wife and find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: We've all heard of in-laws who don't get along, but these guests say their problems have become scary and even life-threatening.

programme.desc: Get ready for a voltageous time! The ghouls are back like you’ve never seen them before in this action-packed adventure!
